name: surgical-teaching-phase1-poc
description: Windows C/S surgical teaching software PoC: 4-channel USB preview, selective recording, local playback index, call workflow and interaction workbench.

scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:signaling
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run audit:high && npm run test
scripts.test:scripts: node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check scripts/summarize-diagnostics.cjs && node --check scripts/analyze-diagnostics.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-signal-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-media-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-media-reverse-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-audio-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-audio-reverse-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-diagnostics-report.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-real-mic-devtools.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-windows-probe.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-lan-topology.cjs && node --check scripts/lan-route-remediation-plan.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-discover.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-probe.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-devtools.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-signal-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-media-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-kylin-audio-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/remote-cross-conference-smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/cross-machine-validation.cjs && node --check scripts/validation-report-index.cjs && node --check scripts/validation-resource-index.cjs && node --check scripts/continuous-cross-validation.cjs && node --check scripts/continuous-validation-index.cjs && node --check scripts/validation-status.cjs && node tests/lan-dev-script.mjs && node tests/npm-audit-retry.mjs && node tests/recording-utils.mjs && node tests/runtime-config-example.mjs && node tests/diagnostic-summary.mjs && node tests/diagnostic-analyzer.mjs && node tests/cross-validation-utils.mjs && node tests/remote-windows-probe.mjs && node tests/lan-topology.mjs && node tests/lan-route-remediation-plan.mjs && node tests/kylin-discovery.mjs && node tests/kylin-devtools-route-policy.mjs && node tests/validation-indexes.mjs
scripts.test:smoke: playwright test tests/recording-management.spec.js && playwright test tests/phase2-smoke.spec.js tests/phase3-patient-binding.spec.js && playwright test tests/phase2-signaling-ui.spec.js
scripts.test:remote:signal:tunnel: node scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:signal
scripts.test:remote:media:tunnel: node scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:media
scripts.test:remote:audio:tunnel: node scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:audio
scripts.test:remote:media:reverse:tunnel: node scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:media:reverse
scripts.test:remote:audio:reverse:tunnel: node scripts/remote-windows-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:audio:reverse
scripts.test:remote:kylin:signal:lan: node scripts/remote-kylin-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:kylin:signal
scripts.test:remote:kylin:media:lan: node scripts/remote-kylin-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:kylin:media
scripts.test:remote:kylin:audio:lan: node scripts/remote-kylin-devtools.cjs run -- npm run test:remote:kylin:audio
